scripts.check: biome check && tsc -b --pretty false && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json
scripts.build: bun run fmt && tsc -b && bun run build:rust
scripts.compile: bun run build && bun run scripts/build-binary.ts && bun build ./dist-bundle/cli.js --compile --no-compile-autoload-bunfig --outfile dist-bundle/piko && cp target/release/orchd dist-bundle/orchd && cp target/release/hostd dist-bundle/hostd
scripts.install-bin: cp dist-bundle/piko /usr/local/bin/piko && cp dist-bundle/orchd /usr/local/bin/orchd && cp dist-bundle/hostd /usr/local/bin/hostd
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run test
